working: STRONG SELL signal when bearPoints>=4, BEARISH when bearPoints>=2; binanceAction='sell' for both
Fear/greed, funding, btcChange24h scoring split into independent bull/bear blocks
/crypto Telegram command shows P&L profit breakdown when sell signal active
/sell and /selleth commands: calculate profit, set pendingConfirmations, log to crypto_trades on YES
/portfolio command: logged holdings P&L + live Binance balances
/confirm and /cancel aliases for YES/NO confirmation system
/crypto-signal endpoint returns binance_portfolio (null if key missing)
FinancesTab LIVE BINANCE section with per-coin EUR values + total
FinancesTab auto-refresh every 5 minutes via setInterval in onMount
Red 'Sell on Binance' button shown on bearish signals
partial: Binance live balances require BINANCE_API_KEY + BINANCE_SECRET_KEY in .env (read-only key)
crypto_trades table must exist in Supabase for sell logging (insert will fail silently if missing)
next: Add BINANCE_API_KEY and BINANCE_SECRET_KEY to .env (read-only key from Binance API Management). Create crypto_trades table in Supabase if needed.
notes: Sell flow: /sell calculates P&L → shows Binance URL → YES confirms → clears portfolio holdings + inserts to crypto_trades. /confirm and /cancel work as aliases for YES/NO.
